# ShipStation Connector - Full Documentation

# ShipStation Connector 0.1.0

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

Anypoint Connector for ShipStation (ShipStation Connector) enables Mule applications to access the
ShipStation API.

> [!NOTE] ShipStation Connector is a beta connector that is subject to the Beta Services Terms at
> [Agreements - Salesforce.com](https://www.salesforce.com/company/legal/) or a written Unified
> Pilot Agreement if executed by Customer, and the Non-GA Gen AI and Non-GA Credit Consumption terms
> in the
> [Product Terms Directory](https://ptd.salesforce.com/?_ga=2.247987783.1372150065.1709219475-629000709.1639001992).
> Use of this beta connector with external systems or services consumes
> [Mule messages](../../general/usage-metrics) and is at the Customerâs sole discretion.

For information about compatibility and fixed issues, refer to the ShipStation Connector Release
Notes.

## Before You Begin

To use this connector, you must be familiar with:

- The ShipStation Connectorâs API
- Anypoint Connectors
- Mule runtime engine (Mule)
- Elements and global elements in a Mule flow
- How to create a Mule app using Anypoint Code Builder or Anypoint Studio

Before creating an app, you must have:

- Credentials to access the ShipStation target resource
- Anypoint Platform
- The latest versions of Anypoint Code Builder or Anypoint Studio

## Next Step

After you complete the prerequisites, youâre ready to create an app and configure the connector
using [Anypoint Studio](../../connectors/introduction/intro-config-use-studio) or
[Anypoint Code Builder](../../connectors/introduction/intro-config-use-acb).

## See Also

- [Introduction to Anypoint Connectors](../../connectors/introduction/introduction-to-anypoint-connectors)
- [Use Exchange to Discover Connectors, Templates, and Examples](../../connectors/introduction/intro-use-exchange)
- [ShipStation Connector Reference](shipstation-connector-reference)
- [Salesforce Help](https://help.salesforce.com)
---

# ShipStation Connector 0.1.0 Reference

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

## Configurations

---

### Config

Default configuration.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name for this configuration. Connectors reference the configuration with this name.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Connection</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Config_ApiKey">API Key</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>The connection types to provide to this configuration.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The identifier of this element used to reference it in other components.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Expiration Policy</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ExpirationPolicy">Expiration Policy</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Configures the minimum amount of time that a dynamic configuration instance can remain idle before Mule considers it eligible for expiration. This does not mean that the platform expires the instance at the exact moment that it becomes eligible. Mule purges the instances as appropriate.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Connection Types

##### API Key

###### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>apiKey</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API key for authentication.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>baseUri</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The base URI for the ShipStation API.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>TLS Configuration</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Tls">TLS</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Configures TLS. If using the HTTPS protocol, you must configure TLS.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Reconnection">Reconnection</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>When the application is deployed, a connectivity test is performed on all connectors. If set to true, deployment fails if the test doesnât pass after exhausting the associated reconnection strategy.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Supported Operations

- [Add Funds To Carrier](#AddFundsToCarrier)
- [Add To Batch](#AddToBatch)
- [Create Batch](#CreateBatch)
- [Create Label](#CreateLabel)
- [Create Shipments](#CreateShipments)
- [Delete Batch](#DeleteBatch)
- [Get Batch By External ID](#GetBatchByExternalId)
- [Get Batch By ID](#GetBatchById)
- [Get Carrier By ID](#GetCarrierById)
- [Get Label By ID](#GetLabelById)
- [Get Shipment By ID](#GetShipmentById)
- [Get Tracking Log](#GetTrackingLog)
- [List Account Settings](#ListAccountSettings)
- [List Batch Errors](#ListBatchErrors)
- [List Carrier Package Types](#ListCarrierPackageTypes)
- [List Carrier Services](#ListCarrierServices)
- [List Carriers](#ListCarriers)
- [List Tags](#ListTags)
- [List Warehouses](#ListWarehouses)
- [Parse Address](#ParseAddress)
- [Process Batch](#ProcessBatch)
- [Remove From Batch](#RemoveFromBatch)
- [Start Tracking](#StartTracking)
- [Void Label](#VoidLabel)

## Operations

## Add Funds To Carrier

`<shipstation:add-funds-to-carrier>`

Add Funds To Carrier.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>carrier_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Carrier ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- SHIPSTATION:BAD_REQUEST
- SHIPSTATION:CLIENT_ERROR
- SHIPSTATION:CONNECTIVITY
- SHIPSTATION:FORBIDDEN
- SHIPSTATION:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- SHIPSTATION:NOT_FOUND
- SHIPSTATION:SECURITY
- SHIPSTATION:SERVER_ERROR
- SHIPSTATION:TIMEOUT
- SHIPSTATION:UNAUTHORIZED

## Add To Batch

`<shipstation:add-to-batch>`

Add To Batch.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>batch_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Batch ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Null</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- SHIPSTATION:BAD_REQUEST
- SHIPSTATION:CLIENT_ERROR
- SHIPSTATION:CONNECTIVITY
- SHIPSTATION:FORBIDDEN
- SHIPSTATION:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- SHIPSTATION:NOT_FOUND
- SHIPSTATION:SECURITY
- SHIPSTATION:SERVER_ERROR
- SHIPSTATION:TIMEOUT
- SHIPSTATION:UNAUTHORIZED

Create Batch.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Null</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Config](#Config)

- SHIPSTATION:CLIENT_ERROR

`<shipstation:delete-batch>`

Delete Batch.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>batch_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Batch ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Null</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Config](#Config)

- SHIPSTATION:BAD_REQUEST
- SHIPSTATION:CLIENT_ERROR

- SHIPSTATION:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- SHIPSTATION:NOT_FOUND
- SHIPSTATION:SECURITY

## Get Carrier By ID

`<shipstation:get-carrier-by-id>`

Get Carrier By ID.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>carrier_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Carrier ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- SHIPSTATION:BAD_REQUEST
- SHIPSTATION:CLIENT_ERROR
- SHIPSTATION:CONNECTIVITY
- SHIPSTATION:FORBIDDEN
- SHIPSTATION:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- SHIPSTATION:NOT_FOUND
- SHIPSTATION:SECURITY
- SHIPSTATION:SERVER_ERROR
- SHIPSTATION:TIMEOUT
- SHIPSTATION:UNAUTHORIZED

## Get Label By ID

`<shipstation:get-label-by-id>`

Get Label By ID.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>label_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Label ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>label_download_type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>url</p></li><li><p>inline</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Label download type.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- SHIPSTATION:BAD_REQUEST
- SHIPSTATION:CLIENT_ERROR
- SHIPSTATION:CONNECTIVITY
- SHIPSTATION:FORBIDDEN
- SHIPSTATION:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- SHIPSTATION:NOT_FOUND
- SHIPSTATION:SECURITY
- SHIPSTATION:SERVER_ERROR
- SHIPSTATION:TIMEOUT
- SHIPSTATION:UNAUTHORIZED

## List Batch Errors

`<shipstation:list-batch-errors>`

List Batch Errors.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>batch_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Batch ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>page</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Page.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>pagesize</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Page size.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#RepeatableInMemoryIterable">Repeatable In Memory Iterable</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#RepeatableFileStoreIterable">Repeatable File Store Iterable</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-iterable</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configures how Mule processes streams. Repeatable streams are the default behavior.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Array of Any</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- SHIPSTATION:BAD_REQUEST
- SHIPSTATION:CLIENT_ERROR
- SHIPSTATION:CONNECTIVITY
- SHIPSTATION:FORBIDDEN
- SHIPSTATION:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- SHIPSTATION:NOT_FOUND
- SHIPSTATION:SECURITY
- SHIPSTATION:SERVER_ERROR
- SHIPSTATION:TIMEOUT
- SHIPSTATION:UNAUTHORIZED

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Process Batch

`<shipstation:process-batch>`

Process Batch.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>batch_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Batch ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Null</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- SHIPSTATION:BAD_REQUEST
- SHIPSTATION:CLIENT_ERROR
- SHIPSTATION:CONNECTIVITY
- SHIPSTATION:FORBIDDEN
- SHIPSTATION:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- SHIPSTATION:NOT_FOUND
- SHIPSTATION:SECURITY
- SHIPSTATION:SERVER_ERROR
- SHIPSTATION:TIMEOUT
- SHIPSTATION:UNAUTHORIZED

## Remove From Batch

`<shipstation:remove-from-batch>`

Remove From Batch.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>batch_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Batch ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Null</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- SHIPSTATION:BAD_REQUEST
- SHIPSTATION:CLIENT_ERROR
- SHIPSTATION:CONNECTIVITY
- SHIPSTATION:FORBIDDEN
- SHIPSTATION:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- SHIPSTATION:NOT_FOUND
- SHIPSTATION:SECURITY
- SHIPSTATION:SERVER_ERROR
- SHIPSTATION:TIMEOUT
- SHIPSTATION:UNAUTHORIZED

## Start Tracking

Start Tracking.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>carrier_code</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Carrier code.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>tracking_number</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Tracking number.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Null</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

Void Label.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>label_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Label ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Config](#Config)

- SHIPSTATION:BAD_REQUEST
- SHIPSTATION:CLIENT_ERROR
- SHIPSTATION:CONNECTIVITY
- SHIPSTATION:FORBIDDEN
- SHIPSTATION:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- SHIPSTATION:NOT_FOUND
- SHIPSTATION:SECURITY
- SHIPSTATION:SERVER_ERROR
- SHIPSTATION:TIMEOUT
- SHIPSTATION:UNAUTHORIZED

## Types

### TLS

Configures TLS to provide secure communications for the Mule app.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Enabled Protocols</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A comma-separated list of protocols enabled for this context.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Enabled Cipher Suites</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Comma-separated list of cipher suites enabled for this context.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Trust Store</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#TrustStore">Truststore</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configures the TLS trust store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Key Store</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#KeyStore">Key Store</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configures the TLS keystore.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Revocation Check</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#StandardRevocationCheck">Standard Revocation Check</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#CustomOcspResponder">Custom OCSP Responder</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#CrlFile">CRL File</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configures a revocation checking mechanism.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Truststore

Configures the truststore for TLS.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Path</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The location (which will be resolved relative to the current classpath and file system, if possible) of the trust store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The password used to protect the trust store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The type of store used.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Algorithm</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The algorithm used by the trust store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Insecure</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If true, no certificate validations will be performed, rendering connections vulnerable to attacks. Use at your own risk.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Key Store

Configures the keystore for the TLS protocol. The keystore you generate contains a private key and a
public certificate.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Path</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The location (which will be resolved relative to the current classpath and file system, if possible) of the key store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The type of store used.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Alias</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>When the key store contains many private keys, this attribute indicates the alias of the key that should be used. If not defined, the first key in the file will be used by default.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Key Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The password used to protect the private key.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The password used to protect the key store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Algorithm</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The algorithm used by the key store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Standard Revocation Check

Configures standard revocation checks for TLS certificates.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Only End Entities</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Which elements to verify in the certificate chain:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>true</code></p></li></ul></div><div><p>Verify only the last element in the certificate chain.</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>false</code></p></li></ul></div><div><p>Verify all elements in the certificate chain.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Prefer Crls</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How to check certificate validity:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>true</code></p></li></ul></div><div><p>Check the Certification Revocation List (CRL) for certificate validity.</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>false</code></p></li></ul></div><div><p>Use the Online Certificate Status Protocol (OCSP) to check certificate validity.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>No Fallback</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Whether to use the secondary method to check certificate validity:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>true</code></p></li></ul></div><div><p>Use the method that wasnât specified in the <strong>Prefer Crls</strong> field (the secondary method) to check certificate validity.</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>false</code></p></li></ul></div><div><p>Do not use the secondary method to check certificate validity.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Soft Fail</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>What to do if the revocation server canât be reached or is busy:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>true</code></p></li></ul></div><div><p>Avoid verification failure.</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>false</code></p></li></ul></div><div><p>Allow the verification to fail.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Custom OCSP Responder

Configures a custom OCSP responder for certification revocation checks.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Url</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The URL of the OCSP responder.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Cert Alias</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Alias of the signing certificate for the OCSP response. If specified, the alias must be in the trust store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### CRL File

Specifies the location of the certification revocation list (CRL) file.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Path</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The path to the CRL file.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Reconnection

Configures a reconnection strategy for an operation.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Fails Deployment</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>When the application is deployed, a connectivity test is performed on all connectors. If set to true, deployment fails if the test doesnât pass after exhausting the associated reconnection strategy.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#Reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The reconnection strategy to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Reconnect

Configures a standard reconnection strategy, which specifies how often to reconnect and how many
reconnection attempts the connector source or operation can make.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Frequency</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How often in milliseconds to reconnect.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Blocking</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If false, the reconnection strategy will run in a separate, non-blocking thread.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Count</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How many reconnection attempts the Mule app can make.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Reconnect Forever

Configures a forever reconnection strategy by which the connector source or operation attempts to
reconnect at a specified frequency for as long as the Mule app runs.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Frequency</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How often in milliseconds to reconnect.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Blocking</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If false, the reconnection strategy will run in a separate, non-blocking thread.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Expiration Policy

Configures an expiration policy strategy.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Max Idle Time</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A scalar time value for the maximum amount of time a dynamic configuration instance should be allowed to be idle before itâs considered eligible for expiration.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time Unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Max Idle Time</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Error Mapping

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Source</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>ANY</p></li><li><p>REDELIVERY_EXHAUSTED</p></li><li><p>TRANSFORMATION</p></li><li><p>EXPRESSION</p></li><li><p>SECURITY</p></li><li><p>CLIENT_SECURITY</p></li><li><p>SERVER_SECURITY</p></li><li><p>ROUTING</p></li><li><p>CONNECTIVITY</p></li><li><p>RETRY_EXHAUSTED</p></li><li><p>TIMEOUT</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Error source type.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Target error type.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Repeatable In Memory Iterable

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Initial Buffer Size</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The amount of instances that is initially be allowed to be kept in memory to consume the stream and provide random access to it. If the stream contains more data than can fit into this buffer, then the buffer expands according to the bufferSizeIncrement attribute, with an upper limit of maxBufferSize. Default value is 100 instances.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Buffer Size Increment</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>This is by how much the buffer size expands if it exceeds its initial size. Setting a value of zero or lower means that the buffer should not expand, meaning that a STREAM_MAXIMUM_SIZE_EXCEEDED error is raised when the buffer gets full. Default value is 100 instances.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Max Buffer Size</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The maximum amount of memory to use. If more than that is used then a STREAM_MAXIMUM_SIZE_EXCEEDED error is raised. A value lower than or equal to zero means no limit.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Repeatable File Store Iterable

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>In Memory Objects</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The maximum amount of instances to keep in memory. If more than that is required, content on the disk is buffered.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Buffer Unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>BYTE</p></li><li><p>KB</p></li><li><p>MB</p></li><li><p>GB</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Unit for the <strong>In Memory Objects</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>
